WSTxda/MicroG-RE.name: MorpheApp/MicroG-RE
WSTxda/MicroG-RE.body:
### Features

- Added neutral result in Self-Check group to non required permission and actions (0384796baa284c163fda5e8c4f145f90cd0efdd4)
  - Set neutral result on **overlay over others apps** permission

### Bug Fixes

- Fix #112: Open **App battery usage** screen to setup battery optimization permission in Xiaomi devices (f91315a8c834ed20a84131af6e39de47593ba1e8)
- Privacy settings crash if open it in account manager activity (c17c7321f73abb85c5cf0d5b2b276b4afd844257)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MorpheApp/MicroG-RE/compare/6.0.0...6.1.0

REAndroid/APKEditor.name: REAndroid/APKEditor
REAndroid/APKEditor.body:
## What's Changed
* Set smali comment level to `basic` (For faster smali deompiling):https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/commit/a5390a3401153ab9ac38b4487a279316eee7400d
* Fix: Protector - dictionaries options by @Kirlif in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/218


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/compare/V1.4.6...V1.4.7
